shen.name: Dark Hollow Falls
shen.why: Short forest walk to a popular waterfall — good first-day warm-up.

shen.name: Stony Man Summit
shen.why: Wide summit views without a long climb.

shen.name: Little Stony Man Overlook
shen.why: Quick payoff viewpoint on Skyline Drive.

shen.name: Limberlost Trail
shen.why: Flat, fern-lined loop — strong wildlife and forest photography.

shen.name: Hawksbill Summit
shen.why: Highest point in the park with big valley views.

shen.name: Cedar Run Falls
shen.why: Rewarding waterfall hike that stays under three miles.

shen.name: Skyline Drive Scenic Overlook
shen.why: Flexible pull-off for sunrise or sunset without hiking.

shen.name: Thornton Gap Visitor Center
shen.why: Maps, restrooms, and current road/alert info near Thornton Gap.

acad.name: Jordan Pond Path
acad.why: Classic lakeside loop with Bubbles views — flat and photogenic.

acad.name: Ocean Path
acad.why: Coastal walk linking Sand Beach and Otter Cliff.

acad.name: Cadillac Mountain Summit
acad.why: Iconic sunrise perch — verify vehicle reservation rules separately.

acad.name: Beehive Trail
acad.why: Short but steep loop with iron rungs — skip if heights are an issue.

acad.name: Great Head Trail
acad.why: Sand Beach headland loop with ocean panoramas.

acad.name: Park Loop Road Overlook
acad.why: Flexible scenic-drive stop when you want views without mileage.

acad.name: Hulls Cove Visitor Center
acad.why: Orientation, restrooms, and current alerts near Bar Harbor.
